name: Lamb Cheeseburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the bacon and pass both bacon and lamb through a meat grinder fitted with a medium cutter. Scrape into a bowl, mix well, and form into 4 patties.
2. Place the patties in the refrigerator, covered, to chill for 20 minutes.
3. Heat a large heavy skillet to almost smoking.
4. Add the patties and reduce heat to medium. Cook for 3 minutes on one side.
5. Turn the patties and continue cooking for 2 more minutes on the other side.
6. Place a tablespoon dollop of cheese on each patty, cover, and cook another 1-to-2 minutes.
7. Remove the patties from the heat and place on hamburger buns. Serve immediately and offer mustard and mayonnaise.
